tagline.en: Hand-pulled noodles in the heart of London
tagline.zh: 伦敦市中心的手工拉面

description.en: Freshly pulled noodles, rich broths, and classic northern Chinese sides.
description.zh: 现拉面条、浓郁汤底，以及经典北方面点小吃。

allergenNotice.en: Please tell us about allergies before ordering. Dishes may contain traces of nuts, gluten, sesame, soy, egg, and shellfish.
allergenNotice.zh: 请在点餐前告知过敏信息。菜品可能含有坚果、麸质、芝麻、大豆、鸡蛋和贝类痕量成分。
